    H

    handle(Object) - Method in class handlers.AddReservationHandler
    Processes the server response data for adding a reservation.
    handle(Object) - Method in class handlers.AddSpecialDateHandler
    Handles the server response after a special date is added.
    handle(Object) - Method in class handlers.AddWaitingHandler
    Handles the server response for adding a reservation or waiting list entry.
    handle(Object) - Method in class handlers.CancelReservationHandler
    Handles the server response for a reservation cancellation.
    handle(Object) - Method in class handlers.CancelWaitingHandler
    Processes the server response for a waiting list cancellation request.

    Handles the server response for creating a new opening day.
    handle(Object) - Method in class handlers.DeleteOpeningHoursHandler
    Handles the server response for deleting opening hours.

    Processes the server response for deleting a special date.

    Processes the server response for deleting a table.

    Handles the server response for a forgotten confirmation code request.

    Handles the server response for a "forgot code" request.

    Processes the server response containing the list of reservations.

    Handles the server response for fetching all tables.

    Processes the server response data.

    Processes the server response containing available reservation times.

    Processes the server response data.

    Handles the server response.

    Processes the server response for a table insertion request.

    Processes the server response received after a login attempt.

    Processes reservations affected by table changes.

    Internal helper method to process client removals from the tracking map and UI.

    Core message handler for all incoming data from clients.
    handleMessageFromClient(Object, ConnectionToClient) - Method in class src.ocsf.server.AbstractServer
    Handles a command sent from one client to the server.

    Handles a command sent from the client to the server.

    This method is used to handle messages coming from the client.

    This method is used to handle messages coming from the client.

    Handles messages received from server

    Handles a message sent from the server to this client.

    Handles a message sent from the server to this client.

    This method is used to handle messages from the server.
